title: greenwork (aerial wall)
creator: Laing, Rosemary
description: Laing explores the theme of visual perception by depicting a distorted wall of intense blurred green that bisects an immense tree canopy. Laing references a black and white photograph “View from Nimbin Rocks” by Australian photographer Peter Elliston that she then digitizes, hyper-saturates with color, and distorts to create the illusion of a time warp.
subject: digital manipulation; photography;

title: Shackled Hands And Human Chains
creator: Young, Purvis
description: Using a blend of collage, painting and found objects, Purvis focused on the experience of African Americans in the south including social issues and slavery.
subject: Painting; African American; southern culture
